---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
author: "`r params$report_author`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    code_folding: hide
params:
  # Engine flag: TRUE only when this template is stitched into the
  # combined report (set by the parent). Leave false for normal renders.
  combined_mode: false
  # Master Data Path
  data_path: !r here::here("1_data", "master_macro_panel.csv")
  
  # Variables
  entity_var: "district"
  time_var: "year"
  filter_time: 2025
  value_var: "literacy_rate"
  target_var: "target_score"
  
  # KPI Background Zones (0 to 100 scale)
  zone_poor_max: 50
  zone_fair_max: 75
  zone_good_max: 100
  
  # Policy-Facing Labels
  metric_name: "Literacy Rate vs. Target (%)"

  # --- Report Text (all editable; leave "" to use the smart default) ---
  report_title: "Target Tracker: Bullet Chart"
  report_author: "Ibraheem Saqib Ellahi"
  chart_title: ""
  chart_subtitle: ""
  x_label: ""
  y_label: ""
  source_note: "Generated via CERP Analytics Template"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = !isTRUE(params$combined_mode),
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev.args = list(bg = "#FAF9F6"),
  fig.path = paste0(here::here("4_output", "figures"), "/"),
  fig.width = 9,
  fig.height = 5, 
  fig.retina = 3
)
```

```{r cerp-style, echo=FALSE, results='asis', eval=!isTRUE(params$combined_mode)}
cat("<style>", readr::read_file(here::here("2_R", "cerp_style.css")), "</style>")
```

```{r load-and-prep}
library(tidyverse)

source(here::here("2_R", "2.5_helpers.R"), local = TRUE)

# Load data (headers/values whitespace-scrubbed) and validate YAML params
raw_data <- cerp_load(params$data_path)
cerp_validate(raw_data, params[grepl("_var$", names(params))])

# ==============================================================================
# DATA SCRUBBING & PROCESSING BLOCK
# ==============================================================================
# Define string parameters OUTSIDE the mutate chain to prevent vector duplication
filter_str <- as.character(params$filter_time)

plot_data <- raw_data %>%
  # 1. Safely drop NAs for required columns
  drop_na(!!sym(params$time_var), !!sym(params$entity_var), !!sym(params$value_var), !!sym(params$target_var)) %>%
  
  # 2. Type-Safe Filtering for the specific time period
  mutate(Time_Raw = as.character(!!sym(params$time_var))) %>%
  filter(Time_Raw == filter_str) %>%
  
  # 3. Scrub labels and force strict numeric types for chart math
  mutate(
    Entity = str_wrap(str_to_title(str_trim(as.character(!!sym(params$entity_var)))), width = 15),
    Value = as.numeric(!!sym(params$value_var)),
    Target = as.numeric(!!sym(params$target_var)),
    Poor = as.numeric(params$zone_poor_max),
    Fair = as.numeric(params$zone_fair_max),
    Good = as.numeric(params$zone_good_max)
  ) %>%
  
  # 4. Sort entities by performance so the chart flows logically
  arrange(Value) %>%
  mutate(Entity = factor(Entity, levels = unique(Entity)))
```


```{r plot-bullet}
source(here::here("2_R", "2.0_setup_theme.R"), local = TRUE)

ggplot(plot_data, aes(y = Entity)) +
  
  # 1. Background Zones (Drawn widest to narrowest so they stack correctly)
  # Good Zone (Lightest Grey)
  geom_col(aes(x = Good), fill = "#EBEBEB", width = 0.6) +
  # Fair Zone (Medium Grey)
  geom_col(aes(x = Fair), fill = "#D6D6D6", width = 0.6) +
  # Poor Zone (Dark Grey)
  geom_col(aes(x = Poor), fill = "#BFBFBF", width = 0.6) +
  
  # 2. Actual Performance Bar (Thinner, filled with primary brand color)
  geom_col(aes(x = Value), fill = cerp_cols["primary"], width = 0.25) +
  
  # 3. Target Marker (Using geom_segment forces rendering without range-guessing)
  geom_segment(aes(
      x = Target, xend = Target, 
      y = as.numeric(Entity) - 0.3, yend = as.numeric(Entity) + 0.3
    ), 
    color = cerp_cols[["text"]], linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  
  theme_cerp() +
  
  # Set the X-axis limits based on the good zone, adding a tiny right margin to avoid clipping targets
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, params$zone_good_max), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  
  # Clean up the theme for a minimal dashboard look
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", color = cerp_cols[["text"]]),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = if (nzchar(params$chart_title)) params$chart_title else (paste("KPI Tracking:", params$metric_name)),
    subtitle = if (nzchar(params$chart_subtitle)) params$chart_subtitle else (paste0("Status as of ", params$filter_time, ". Dark grey: <", params$zone_poor_max, "%, Medium: <", params$zone_fair_max, "%, Light: <", params$zone_good_max, "%. Black line indicates target.")),
    x = if (nzchar(params$x_label)) params$x_label else (params$metric_name),
    y = if (nzchar(params$y_label)) params$y_label else (NULL),
    caption = params$source_note
  )
```
